local wezterm = require("wezterm")
local act = wezterm.action
local mux = wezterm.mux

local config = wezterm.config_builder()

-- ============================================================
-- TokyoNight Palette
-- ============================================================

local c = {
	bg = "#1a1b26",
	bg_dark = "#15161e",
	bg_popup = "#1f2335",
	bg_hl = "#292e42",

	fg = "#c0caf5",
	fg_dark = "#a9b1d6",
	fg_gutter = "#3b4261",

	black = "#414868",
	comment = "#565f89",
	dark3 = "#545c7e",

	blue = "#7aa2f7",
	cyan = "#7dcfff",
	green = "#9ece6a",
	orange = "#ff9e64",
	yellow = "#e0af68",
	magenta = "#bb9af7",
	red = "#f7768e",
	red_dark = "#db4b4b",

	blue_b = "#8db0ff",
	cyan_b = "#a4daff",
	green_b = "#9fe044",
	yellow_b = "#faba4a",
	magenta_b = "#c7a9ff",
	red_b = "#ff899d",
}

-- ============================================================
-- General
-- ============================================================

-- Prefer the native Wayland path on Hyprland/Wayland; forcing XWayland can
-- make rapid Neovim redraws feel noticeably less responsive.
config.enable_wayland = true
config.check_for_updates = false
config.show_update_window = false
config.warn_about_missing_glyphs = false
config.audible_bell = "Disabled"

-- ============================================================
-- Performance
-- ============================================================

-- On the Flatpak 202402 build, OpenGL is often steadier than WebGPU for
-- full-screen Neovim redraws. If a future WezTerm build improves WebGPU on
-- your GPU, this is the first setting to try reverting.
config.front_end = "OpenGL"
config.webgpu_power_preference = "HighPerformance"

-- Prefer consistent frame pacing over chasing high FPS; 60 is usually smoother
-- on WezTerm when scrolling dense Neovim buffers.
config.max_fps = 60
config.animation_fps = 1
config.cursor_blink_rate = 0
config.default_cursor_style = "SteadyBlock"

-- The status callback checks git/battery state; update it less often so it
-- does not compete with Neovim during heavy redraws.
config.status_update_interval = 5000

-- Disable ligature shaping for lower text-layout overhead in dense code views.
config.harfbuzz_features = { "calt=0", "clig=0", "liga=0" }

config.window_close_confirmation = "NeverPrompt"
config.skip_close_confirmation_for_processes_named = {
	"bash",
	"zsh",
	"fish",
	"sh",
	"nu",
}

-- ============================================================
-- Window
-- ============================================================

config.window_decorations = "NONE"
config.window_background_opacity = 1.0
config.initial_cols = 120
config.initial_rows = 30
config.enable_scroll_bar = false
config.scrollback_lines = 10000

config.window_padding = {
	left = 0,
	right = 0,
	top = 0,
	bottom = 0,
}

config.inactive_pane_hsb = {
	saturation = 0.95,
	brightness = 0.8,
}

wezterm.on("gui-startup", function()
	local _, _, window = mux.spawn_window({})
	window:gui_window():maximize()
end)
-- Font
-- ============================================================

config.font = wezterm.font_with_fallback({
	{ family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono", weight = "Medium" },
	{ family = "JetBrains Mono", weight = "Medium" },
	{ family = "Symbols Nerd Font Mono" },
	{ family = "Noto Color Emoji" },
})

config.font_size = 10.75
config.line_height = 1.1
config.cell_width = 1.0

config.freetype_load_target = "Normal"
config.freetype_render_target = "Normal"

config.underline_position = -3
config.underline_thickness = 1

-- ============================================================
-- Colors
-- ============================================================

config.colors = {
	background = c.bg,
	foreground = c.fg,
	cursor_bg = c.fg,
	cursor_fg = c.bg,
	cursor_border = c.fg,

	selection_bg = c.bg_hl,
	selection_fg = c.fg,

	split = c.fg_gutter,
	compose_cursor = c.orange,

	ansi = {
		c.bg_dark,
		c.red,
		c.green,
		c.yellow,
		c.blue,
		c.magenta,
		c.cyan,
		c.fg_dark,
	},

	brights = {
		c.black,
		c.red_b,
		c.green_b,
		c.yellow_b,
		c.blue_b,
		c.magenta_b,
		c.cyan_b,
		c.fg,
	},

	indexed = {
		[16] = c.orange,
		[17] = c.red_dark,
	},

	tab_bar = {
		background = c.bg_dark,

		active_tab = {
			bg_color = c.bg,
			fg_color = c.blue,
			intensity = "Bold",
		},
		inactive_tab = {
			bg_color = c.bg_dark,
			fg_color = c.comment,
		},
		inactive_tab_hover = {
			bg_color = c.bg_hl,
			fg_color = c.fg_dark,
		},
		new_tab = {
			bg_color = c.bg_dark,
			fg_color = c.comment,
		},
		new_tab_hover = {
			bg_color = c.bg_hl,
			fg_color = c.fg,
		},
	},
}

-- ============================================================
-- Tab bar
-- ============================================================

config.enable_tab_bar = true
config.tab_bar_at_bottom = false
config.use_fancy_tab_bar = false
config.show_new_tab_button_in_tab_bar = false
config.hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = false
config.tab_max_width = 40
config.show_tab_index_in_tab_bar = false

local function get_path_from_uri(uri)
	if not uri then
		return nil
	end

	if type(uri) == "userdata" and uri.file_path then
		return uri.file_path
	end

	local s = tostring(uri)
	local path = s:gsub("^file://[^/]*", "")
	path = path:gsub("%%(%x%x)", function(hex)
		return string.char(tonumber(hex, 16))
	end)

	if path == "" then
		return nil
	end

	return path
end

local function shorten_path(path)
	if not path or path == "" then
		return nil
	end

	local home = os.getenv("HOME")

	if home and path == home then
		return "~"
	end

	if home and path:sub(1, #home + 1) == home .. "/" then
		path = "~" .. path:sub(#home + 1)
	end

	local parts = {}
	for p in path:gmatch("[^/]+") do
		table.insert(parts, p)
	end

	if path:sub(1, 1) == "~" then
		if #parts == 1 then
			return "~"
		elseif #parts >= 2 then
			return "~/" .. parts[#parts - 1] .. "/" .. parts[#parts]
		end
	end

	if #parts >= 2 then
		return parts[#parts - 1] .. "/" .. parts[#parts]
	end

	return parts[#parts] or path
end

local function get_cwd(tab)
	local pane = tab.active_pane
	if not pane then
		return "?"
	end

	local path = get_path_from_uri(pane.current_working_dir)
	local short = shorten_path(path)
	if short and short ~= "" then
		return short
	end

	local proc = pane.foreground_process_name
	if proc and proc ~= "" then
		local name = proc:gsub(".*[/\\]", "")
		if name ~= "" then
			return name
		end
	end

	return "?"
end

wezterm.on("format-tab-title", function(tab, _, _, _, _, max_width)
	local cwd = get_cwd(tab)
	local title = (tab.tab_title and #tab.tab_title > 0) and tab.tab_title or cwd

	local budget = math.max(8, math.min(max_width - 6, 40))
	if wezterm.column_width(title) > budget then
		title = wezterm.truncate_left(title, budget)
	end

	local tab_bg = tab.is_active and c.bg or c.bg_dark
	local tab_fg = tab.is_active and c.fg or c.comment
	local idx_fg = tab.is_active and c.blue or c.dark3

	return {
		{ Background = { Color = tab_bg } },
		{ Foreground = { Color = idx_fg } },
		{ Attribute = { Intensity = tab.is_active and "Bold" or "Normal" } },
		{ Text = " " .. tostring(tab.tab_index + 1) .. " " },

		{ Background = { Color = tab_bg } },
		{ Foreground = { Color = tab_fg } },
		{ Attribute = { Intensity = "Normal" } },
		{ Text = title .. " " },
	}
end)

-- ============================================================
-- Status bar
-- ============================================================

local function git_branch(pane)
	local cwd_uri = pane:get_current_working_dir()
	if not cwd_uri then
		return nil
	end

	local cwd = get_path_from_uri(cwd_uri)
	if not cwd then
		return nil
	end

	local path = cwd
	for _ = 1, 8 do
		local f = io.open(path .. "/.git/HEAD", "r")
		if f then
			local head = f:read("*l") or ""
			f:close()
			return head:match("ref: refs/heads/(.+)") or head:sub(1, 7)
		end

		local parent = path:match("^(.*)/[^/]+$")
		if not parent or parent == path then
			break
		end
		path = parent
	end

	return nil
end

wezterm.on("update-status", function(window, pane)
	local left = {}

	local ws = window:active_workspace()
	local ws_label = (ws == "default") and "default" or ws

	table.insert(left, { Background = { Color = c.blue } })
	table.insert(left, { Foreground = { Color = c.bg_dark } })
	table.insert(left, { Attribute = { Intensity = "Bold" } })
	table.insert(left, { Text = "  " .. ws_label .. "  " })

	if window:leader_is_active() then
		table.insert(left, { Background = { Color = c.bg_dark } })
		table.insert(left, { Foreground = { Color = c.orange } })
		table.insert(left, { Text = " WAIT " })
	end

	window:set_left_status(wezterm.format(left))

	local right = {}

	-- git branch first
	local branch = git_branch(pane)
	if branch then
		table.insert(right, { Background = { Color = c.bg_hl } })
		table.insert(right, { Foreground = { Color = c.orange } })
		table.insert(right, { Text = " 󰊢 " })
		table.insert(right, { Foreground = { Color = c.fg_dark } })
		table.insert(right, { Text = branch .. " " })
	end

	-- battery second
	local bat_info = wezterm.battery_info()
	if bat_info and #bat_info > 0 then
		local bat = bat_info[1]
		local pct = math.floor(bat.state_of_charge * 100 + 0.5)

		local bat_icon, bat_color
		local charging = bat.state == "Charging" or bat.state == "Full"

		if charging then
			bat_icon = "󰂄"
			bat_color = c.green
		elseif pct >= 80 then
			bat_icon = "󰁹"
			bat_color = c.green
		elseif pct >= 60 then
			bat_icon = "󰂁"
			bat_color = c.green
		elseif pct >= 40 then
			bat_icon = "󰁾"
			bat_color = c.yellow
		elseif pct >= 20 then
			bat_icon = "󰁼"
			bat_color = c.orange
		else
			bat_icon = "󰁺"
			bat_color = c.red
		end

		table.insert(right, { Background = { Color = c.bg_hl } })
		table.insert(right, { Foreground = { Color = bat_color } })
		table.insert(right, { Text = " " .. bat_icon .. " " })
		table.insert(right, { Foreground = { Color = c.fg_dark } })
		table.insert(right, { Text = pct .. "% " })
	end

	-- time last
	table.insert(right, { Background = { Color = c.blue } })
	table.insert(right, { Foreground = { Color = c.bg_dark } })
	table.insert(right, { Attribute = { Intensity = "Bold" } })
	table.insert(right, { Text = " 󰥔 " .. wezterm.strftime("%H:%M") .. " " })

	window:set_right_status(wezterm.format(right))
end)

-- Avoid the default URL regex set scanning every rendered line. Keep only the
-- explicit rules below; Neovim can still handle most links/files with gx/gF.
config.hyperlink_rules = {}

table.insert(config.hyperlink_rules, {
	regex = [[\bfile://\S*\b]],
	format = "$0",
})

table.insert(config.hyperlink_rules, {
	regex = [[\b(?:localhost|127\.0\.0\.1|0\.0\.0\.0):[0-9]{2,5}\S*\b]],
	format = "http://$0",
})

-- ============================================================
-- Mouse
-- ============================================================

config.mouse_bindings = {
	{
		event = { Up = { streak = 1, button = "Left" } },
		mods = "CTRL",
		action = act.OpenLinkAtMouseCursor,
	},
	{
		event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = "Left" } },
		mods = "CTRL",
		action = act.Nop,
	},

	{
		event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = "Right" } },
		mods = "NONE",
		action = act.PasteFrom("Clipboard"),
	},
	{
		event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = "Middle" } },
		mods = "NONE",
		action = act.PasteFrom("PrimarySelection"),
	},
	{
		event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelUp = 1 } } },
		mods = "CTRL",
		action = act.IncreaseFontSize,
	},
	{
		event = { Down = { streak = 1, button = { WheelDown = 1 } } },
		mods = "CTRL",
		action = act.DecreaseFontSize,
	},
}

-- ============================================================
-- Keybindings
-- tmux-like leader workflow
-- ============================================================

-- tmux prefix equivalent: `
-- Press `, then another key from the bindings below.
config.leader = { key = "`", mods = "NONE", timeout_milliseconds = 1000 }
config.disable_default_key_bindings = true

local function is_vim(pane)
	return (pane:get_foreground_process_name() or ""):find("n?vim") ~= nil
end

local pane_direction = {
	h = "Left",
	j = "Down",
	k = "Up",
	l = "Right",
}

local function leader_nav(key)
	return {
		key = key,
		mods = "LEADER",
		action = wezterm.action_callback(function(win, pane)
			-- Keep tmux-like pane movement, but do not steal the key from vim/nvim.
			if is_vim(pane) then
				win:perform_action(act.SendKey({ key = key, mods = "LEADER" }), pane)
			else
				win:perform_action(act.ActivatePaneDirection(pane_direction[key]), pane)
			end
		end),
	}
end

local function resize_pane(key, direction)
	return {
		key = key,
		mods = "LEADER",
		action = act.AdjustPaneSize({ direction, 5 }),
	}
end

local function activate_tab(index)
	return { key = tostring(index), mods = "LEADER", action = act.ActivateTab(index - 1) }
end

config.keys = {
	-- Send literal backtick, equivalent to tmux: bind ` send-prefix
	{ key = "`", mods = "LEADER", action = act.SendKey({ key = "`" }) },

	-- Reload WezTerm config, equivalent to tmux: prefix + r
	{
		key = "r",
		mods = "LEADER",
		action = wezterm.action_callback(function(win, pane)
			win:perform_action(act.ReloadConfiguration, pane)
			win:toast_notification("WezTerm", "Config reloaded", nil, 2000)
		end),
	},

	-- New tab/window, equivalent to tmux windows
	{ key = "c", mods = "LEADER", action = act.SpawnTab("CurrentPaneDomain") },
	{ key = "n", mods = "LEADER", action = act.SpawnTab("CurrentPaneDomain") },
	{ key = "q", mods = "LEADER", action = act.CloseCurrentPane({ confirm = false }) },
	{ key = "Q", mods = "LEADER", action = act.CloseCurrentTab({ confirm = false }) },

	-- Splits: tmux-compatible keys
	{ key = '"', mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.SplitVertical({ domain = "CurrentPaneDomain" }) },
	{ key = "%", mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.SplitHorizontal({ domain = "CurrentPaneDomain" }) },
	{ key = "H", mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.SplitHorizontal({ domain = "CurrentPaneDomain" }) },
	{ key = "|", mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.SplitHorizontal({ domain = "CurrentPaneDomain" }) },
	{ key = "V", mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.SplitVertical({ domain = "CurrentPaneDomain" }) },
	{ key = "-", mods = "LEADER", action = act.SplitVertical({ domain = "CurrentPaneDomain" }) },

	-- Vim-like pane movement
	leader_nav("h"),
	leader_nav("j"),
	leader_nav("k"),
	leader_nav("l"),

	-- Resize panes, equivalent to tmux prefix + arrows
	resize_pane("LeftArrow", "Left"),
	resize_pane("RightArrow", "Right"),
	resize_pane("UpArrow", "Up"),
	resize_pane("DownArrow", "Down"),

	-- Pane utilities
	{ key = "z", mods = "LEADER", action = act.TogglePaneZoomState },
	{ key = "s", mods = "LEADER", action = act.PaneSelect({ mode = "SwapWithActive" }) },
	{ key = "p", mods = "LEADER", action = act.PaneSelect({}) },
	{ key = "o", mods = "LEADER", action = act.ActivatePaneDirection("Next") },

	-- Toggle tab/status bar, equivalent to tmux prefix + S
	{
		key = "S",
		mods = "LEADER|SHIFT",
		action = wezterm.action_callback(function(win)
			local overrides = win:get_config_overrides() or {}
			overrides.enable_tab_bar = not (overrides.enable_tab_bar == false)
			win:set_config_overrides(overrides)
		end),
	},

	-- Tab navigation, equivalent to tmux windows
	{ key = "Tab", mods = "LEADER", action = act.ActivateLastTab },
	{ key = "h", mods = "LEADER|CTRL", action = act.ActivateTabRelative(-1) },
	{ key = "l", mods = "LEADER|CTRL", action = act.ActivateTabRelative(1) },
	{ key = "{", mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.MoveTabRelative(-1) },
	{ key = "}", mods = "LEADER|SHIFT", action = act.MoveTabRelative(1) },

	activate_tab(1),
	activate_tab(2),
	activate_tab(3),
	activate_tab(4),
	activate_tab(5),
	activate_tab(6),
	activate_tab(7),
	activate_tab(8),
	activate_tab(9),

	-- Rename tab
	{
		key = ",",
		mods = "LEADER",
		action = act.PromptInputLine({
			description = "Rename tab:",
			action = wezterm.action_callback(function(win, _, line)
				if line then
					win:active_tab():set_title(line)
				end
			end),
		}),
	},
	{
		key = "e",
		mods = "LEADER",
		action = act.PromptInputLine({
			description = "Rename tab:",
			action = wezterm.action_callback(function(win, _, line)
				if line then
					win:active_tab():set_title(line)
				end
			end),
		}),
	},

	-- Workspaces: WezTerm-native replacement for tmux sessions
	{ key = "w", mods = "LEADER", action = act.ShowLauncherArgs({ flags = "WORKSPACES" }) },
	{
		key = "W",
		mods = "LEADER|SHIFT",
		action = act.PromptInputLine({
			description = "New workspace name:",
			action = wezterm.action_callback(function(win, _, line)
				if line and #line > 0 then
					win:perform_action(act.SwitchToWorkspace({ name = line }), win:active_pane())
				end
			end),
		}),
	},

	-- Copy/search essentials, kept because default keybindings are disabled
	{ key = "c", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.CopyTo("Clipboard") },
	{ key = "v", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.PasteFrom("Clipboard") },
	{ key = "v", mods = "LEADER", action = act.PasteFrom("PrimarySelection") },
	{ key = "[", mods = "LEADER", action = act.ActivateCopyMode },
	{ key = "y", mods = "LEADER", action = act.ActivateCopyMode },
	{ key = "f", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.Search({ CaseSensitiveString = "" }) },
	{ key = "P", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.ActivateCommandPalette },

	-- Scrollback
	{ key = "u", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.ScrollByPage(-0.5) },
	{ key = "d", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.ScrollByPage(0.5) },
	{ key = "PageUp", mods = "SHIFT", action = act.ScrollByPage(-1) },
	{ key = "PageDown", mods = "SHIFT", action = act.ScrollByPage(1) },
	{ key = "Home", mods = "SHIFT", action = act.ScrollToTop },
	{ key = "End", mods = "SHIFT", action = act.ScrollToBottom },

	-- Font/window utilities
	{ key = "=", mods = "CTRL", action = act.IncreaseFontSize },
	{ key = "-", mods = "CTRL", action = act.DecreaseFontSize },
	{ key = "0", mods = "CTRL", action = act.ResetFontSize },
	{ key = "F11", mods = "NONE", action = act.ToggleFullScreen },
	{ key = "l", mods = "CTRL|SHIFT", action = act.ClearScrollback("ScrollbackAndViewport") },
	{ key = ".", mods = "LEADER", action = act.ShowDebugOverlay },
}

-- ============================================================
-- Copy mode
-- ============================================================

config.key_tables = {
	copy_mode = {
		{ key = "h", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveLeft") },
		{ key = "j", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveDown") },
		{ key = "k", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveUp") },
		{ key = "l", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveRight") },
		{ key = "w", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveForwardWord") },
		{ key = "b", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveBackwardWord") },
		{ key = "e", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveForwardWordEnd") },
		{ key = "0", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveToStartOfLine") },
		{ key = "$", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveToEndOfLineContent") },
		{ key = "g", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveToScrollbackTop") },
		{ key = "G", mods = "NONE", action = act.CopyMode("MoveToScrollbackBottom") },

codeSnippets.codeDescription: The resize_increments boolean configuration option enables/disables window resize increments in the TOML config file. When enabled, the window manager constrains resizing to cell-sized increments.

codeSnippets.codeDescription: WINIT_X11_SCALE_FACTOR can be set in the [env] configuration section to override the automatic DPI scaling on X11. When set to a specific value like 1.0, it forces the scale factor to that value, which directly impacts font size rendering on X11 and XWayland displays.

codeSnippets.codeTitle: Setting window resize increments based on cell dimensions
codeSnippets.codeDescription: When resize_increments is enabled, the window's resize increments are set to the cell_width and cell_height (in PhysicalSize). The cell dimensions are derived from font metrics and used to constrain window resizing to terminal cell boundaries. Scale factor affects padding calculation but the resize increments themselves use the raw cell dimensions.

The `font.offset.y` shifts the glyph rendering position within the cell rather than controlling line height directly—positive values move glyphs up and negative values move them down. arguments.content:
# Alacritty Configuration
# Migrated from WezTerm — TokyoNight theme, JetBrains Mono, tmux-like workflow
#
# NOTE: Alacritty is GPU-accelerated but minimal. Some WezTerm features have
# no direct equivalent:
#   - No tabs/panes (use tmux or zellij)
#   - No status bar (use tmux status bar)
#   - No workspace management
#   - No hyperlink_rules (use hints section instead)
#   - No inactive pane dimming
#   - No reload config keybinding (send SIGUSR1 or restart)

# ============================================================
# Environment
# ============================================================

[env]
TERM = "xterm-256color"

# ============================================================
# Window
# ============================================================

[window]
padding = { x = 0, y = 0 }
dynamic_padding = true
decorations = "None"
opacity = 1.0
blur = false
startup_mode = "Windowed"
dimensions = { columns = 120, lines = 30 }

# ============================================================
# Scrolling
# ============================================================

[scrolling]
history = 10000
multiplier = 3

# ============================================================
# Bell
# ============================================================

[bell]
animation = "Linear"
duration = 0
command = "None"

# ============================================================
# Selection
# ============================================================

[selection]
semantic_escape_chars = ",│`|:\"' ()[]{}<>\t"
save_to_clipboard = true

# ============================================================
# Cursor
# ============================================================

[cursor]
unfocused_hollow = true

[cursor.style]
shape = "Block"
blinking = "Never"

[cursor.vi_cursor_style]
shape = "Block"
blinking = "Never"

# ============================================================
# Font — JetBrains Mono (Nerd Font) Medium
# ============================================================

[font]
size = 10.75
# offset.y simulates WezTerm line_height = 1.1
# Positive value adds vertical space between lines
offset = { x = 0, y = 3 }

[font.normal]
family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono"
style = "Medium"

[font.bold]
family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono"
style = "Bold"

[font.italic]
family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono"
style = "Medium Italic"

# Disable ligatures (matches WezTerm harfbuzz_features = calt=0, clig=0, liga=0)
# Apply to all font styles
[font.glyph_cache]
# No direct glyph cache config — features are per-style below

# Note: Alacritty does not have a global harfbuzz_features toggle.
# Ligature disabling is not yet supported per-font in stable Alacritty.
# If your version supports it, uncomment the features lines below:
# [font.normal]
# features = ["calt=0", "clig=0", "liga=0"]

# ============================================================
# Colors — TokyoNight
# ============================================================

[colors.primary]
background = "#1a1b26"
foreground = "#c0caf5"

[colors.cursor]
text = "#c0caf5"
cursor = "#c0caf5"

[colors.vi_mode_cursor]
text = "#c0caf5"
cursor = "#c0caf5"

[colors.selection]
text = "#c0caf5"
background = "#292e42"

[colors.search.matches]
foreground = "#1a1b26"
background = "#565f89"

[colors.search.focused_match]
foreground = "#1a1b26"
background = "#ff9e64"

# Normal colors (0-7)
[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 0
color = "#15161e"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 1
color = "#f7768e"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 2
color = "#9ece6a"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 3
color = "#e0af68"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 4
color = "#7aa2f7"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 5
color = "#bb9af7"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 6
color = "#7dcfff"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 7
color = "#a9b1d6"

# Bright colors (8-15)
[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 8
color = "#414868"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 9
color = "#ff899d"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 10
color = "#9fe044"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 11
color = "#faba4a"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 12
color = "#8db0ff"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 13
color = "#c7a9ff"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 14
color = "#a4daff"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 15
color = "#c0caf5"

# Extended colors (16-17)
[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 16
color = "#ff9e64"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 17
color = "#db4b4b"

# ============================================================
# Mouse
# ============================================================

[mouse]
hide_when_typing = true

# Right-click paste (matches WezTerm Right-click → PasteFrom Clipboard)
[[mouse.bindings]]
mouse = "Right"
action = "Paste"

# Ctrl+Click to open links (Alacritty uses hints for URLs)
# Middle-click paste from primary selection (default behavior)

# ============================================================
# Hints — Clickable URLs (replaces WezTerm hyperlink_rules)
# ============================================================

[[hints.enabled]]
command = { program = "xdg-open", args = [] }
hyperlinks = true
post_processing = true
persist = false
mouse.enabled = true
mouse.mods = "Control"
binding = { key = "U", mods = "Control|Shift", mode = "Vi|~Search" }

[hints.enabled.regex]
# URLs
regex = "(ipfs:|ipns:|magnet:|mailto:|gemini:|gopher:|https:|http:|news:|file:|git:|ssh:|ftp:)[^\\u0000-\\u001F\\u007F-\\u009F<>\"\\s{-}\\^⟨⟩`]+"

# ============================================================
# Keyboard Bindings
# ============================================================

[keyboard]

# --- Disable all default bindings (matches WezTerm disable_default_key_bindings) ---
# Alacritty doesn't have a "disable all" option, so we override key defaults

# --- Clipboard ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "C"
mods = "Control|Shift"
action = "Copy"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "V"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "~Vi"
action = "Paste"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "V"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "Vi|Search"
action = "Paste"

# --- Font size (matches WezTerm Ctrl+=/-/0) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Plus"
mods = "Control"
action = "IncreaseFontSize"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Equals"
mods = "Control"
action = "IncreaseFontSize"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Minus"
mods = "Control"
action = "DecreaseFontSize"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Key0"
mods = "Control"
action = "ResetFontSize"

# --- Fullscreen (matches WezTerm F11) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "F11"
action = "ToggleFullscreen"

# --- Search (matches WezTerm Ctrl+Shift+F) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "F"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "~Search"
action = "SearchForward"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "B"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "~Search"
action = "SearchBackward"

# --- Scrollback (matches WezTerm Ctrl+Shift+U/D, Shift+PageUp/Down) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "U"
mods = "Control|Shift"
action = "ScrollHalfPageUp"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "D"
mods = "Control|Shift"
action = "ScrollHalfPageDown"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "PageUp"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollPageUp"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "PageDown"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollPageDown"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Home"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollToTop"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "End"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollToBottom"

# --- Clear scrollback (matches WezTerm Ctrl+Shift+L) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "L"
mods = "Control"
action = "ClearLogNotice"

# --- Vi Mode toggle (replaces WezTerm copy mode with Leader [) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Space"
mods = "Shift|Control"
mode = "~Search"
action = "ToggleViMode"

# ============================================================
# Vi Mode Keybindings
# (Replaces WezTerm's copy_mode and search_mode key_tables)
# ============================================================

# --- Vi navigation (h/j/k/l) — built-in defaults, listed for clarity ---
# These are Alacritty's default Vi mode bindings:
#   h/j/k/l → move cursor
#   w/b/e → word motions
#   0/$ → line start/end
#   g/G → top/bottom of scrollback
#   v/V/Ctrl+V → char/line/block selection
#   y → copy selection
#   / → search forward
#   ? → search backward
#   n/N → next/prev match
#   Ctrl+U/D → half page up/down
#   Ctrl+B/F → page up/down
#   i/I/Ctrl+C → exit vi mode
#   Escape → clear selection or exit vi mode

# --- Vi mode extras ---

# Alacritty Configuration
# Migrated from WezTerm — TokyoNight theme, JetBrains Mono, tmux-like workflow
#
# NOTE: Alacritty is GPU-accelerated but minimal. Some WezTerm features have
# no direct equivalent:
#   - No tabs/panes (use tmux or zellij)
#   - No status bar (use tmux status bar)
#   - No workspace management
#   - No hyperlink_rules (use hints section instead)
#   - No inactive pane dimming
#   - No reload config keybinding (send SIGUSR1 or restart)

# ============================================================
# Environment
# ============================================================

[env]
TERM = "xterm-256color"

# ============================================================
# Window
# ============================================================

[window]
padding = { x = 0, y = 0 }
dynamic_padding = true
decorations = "None"
opacity = 1.0
blur = false
startup_mode = "Windowed"
dimensions = { columns = 120, lines = 30 }

# ============================================================
# Scrolling
# ============================================================

[scrolling]
history = 10000
multiplier = 3

# ============================================================
# Bell
# ============================================================

[bell]
animation = "Linear"
duration = 0
command = "None"

# ============================================================
# Selection
# ============================================================

[selection]
semantic_escape_chars = ",│`|:\"' ()[]{}<>\t"
save_to_clipboard = true

# ============================================================
# Cursor
# ============================================================

[cursor]
unfocused_hollow = true

[cursor.style]
shape = "Block"
blinking = "Never"

# vi_cursor_style not available in Alacritty 0.17 — vi cursor uses same style as cursor

# ============================================================
# Font — JetBrains Mono (Nerd Font) Medium
# ============================================================

[font]
size = 10.75
# offset.y simulates WezTerm line_height = 1.1
# Positive value adds vertical space between lines
offset = { x = 0, y = 3 }

[font.normal]
family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono"
style = "Medium"

[font.bold]
family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono"
style = "Bold"

[font.italic]
family = "JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono"
style = "Medium Italic"

# Disable ligatures (matches WezTerm harfbuzz_features = calt=0, clig=0, liga=0)
# Alacritty supports per-style features in newer versions.
# Uncomment the features line below if your Alacritty version supports it:
# features = ["calt=0", "clig=0", "liga=0"]

# ============================================================
# Colors — TokyoNight
# ============================================================

[colors.primary]
background = "#1a1b26"
foreground = "#c0caf5"

[colors.cursor]
text = "#c0caf5"
cursor = "#c0caf5"

[colors.vi_mode_cursor]
text = "#c0caf5"
cursor = "#c0caf5"

[colors.selection]
text = "#c0caf5"
background = "#292e42"

[colors.search.matches]
foreground = "#1a1b26"
background = "#565f89"

[colors.search.focused_match]
foreground = "#1a1b26"
background = "#ff9e64"

# Normal colors (0-7)
[colors.normal]
black   = "#15161e"
red     = "#f7768e"
green   = "#9ece6a"
yellow  = "#e0af68"
blue    = "#7aa2f7"
magenta = "#bb9af7"
cyan    = "#7dcfff"
white   = "#a9b1d6"

# Bright colors (8-15)
[colors.bright]
black   = "#414868"
red     = "#ff899d"
green   = "#9fe044"
yellow  = "#faba4a"
blue    = "#8db0ff"
magenta = "#c7a9ff"
cyan    = "#a4daff"
white   = "#c0caf5"

# Extended colors (16-17)
[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 16
color = "#ff9e64"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 17
color = "#db4b4b"

# ============================================================
# Mouse
# ============================================================

[mouse]
hide_when_typing = true

# Right-click paste (matches WezTerm Right-click → PasteFrom Clipboard)
[[mouse.bindings]]
mouse = "Right"
action = "Paste"

# Ctrl+Click to open links (Alacritty uses hints for URLs)
# Middle-click paste from primary selection (default behavior)

# ============================================================
# Hints — Clickable URLs (replaces WezTerm hyperlink_rules)
# ============================================================

[[hints.enabled]]
command = { program = "xdg-open", args = [] }
hyperlinks = true
post_processing = true
persist = false
mouse.enabled = true
mouse.mods = "Control"

# Alacritty supports per-style features in newer versions.
# Uncomment the features line below if your Alacritty version supports it:
# features = ["calt=0", "clig=0", "liga=0"]

# ============================================================
# Colors — TokyoNight
# ============================================================

[colors.primary]
background = "#1a1b26"
foreground = "#c0caf5"

[colors.cursor]
text = "#c0caf5"
cursor = "#c0caf5"

[colors.vi_mode_cursor]
text = "#c0caf5"
cursor = "#c0caf5"

[colors.selection]
text = "#c0caf5"
background = "#292e42"

[colors.search.matches]
foreground = "#1a1b26"
background = "#565f89"

[colors.search.focused_match]
foreground = "#1a1b26"
background = "#ff9e64"

# Normal colors (0-7)
[colors.normal]
black   = "#15161e"
red     = "#f7768e"
green   = "#9ece6a"
yellow  = "#e0af68"
blue    = "#7aa2f7"
magenta = "#bb9af7"
cyan    = "#7dcfff"
white   = "#a9b1d6"

# Bright colors (8-15)
[colors.bright]
black   = "#414868"
red     = "#ff899d"
green   = "#9fe044"
yellow  = "#faba4a"
blue    = "#8db0ff"
magenta = "#c7a9ff"
cyan    = "#a4daff"
white   = "#c0caf5"

# Extended colors (16-17)
[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 16
color = "#ff9e64"

[[colors.indexed_colors]]
index = 17
color = "#db4b4b"

# ============================================================
# Mouse
# ============================================================

[mouse]
hide_when_typing = true

# Right-click paste (matches WezTerm Right-click → PasteFrom Clipboard)
[[mouse.bindings]]
mouse = "Right"
action = "Paste"

# Ctrl+Click to open links (Alacritty uses hints for URLs)
# Middle-click paste from primary selection (default behavior)

# ============================================================
# Hints — Clickable URLs (replaces WezTerm hyperlink_rules)
# ============================================================

[[hints.enabled]]
command = { program = "xdg-open", args = [] }
hyperlinks = true
post_processing = true
persist = false
mouse.enabled = true
mouse.mods = "Control"
binding = { key = "U", mods = "Control|Shift", mode = "Vi|~Search" }
# URL regex pattern
regex = "(ipfs:|ipns:|magnet:|mailto:|gemini:|gopher:|https:|http:|news:|file:|git:|ssh:|ftp:)[^\\u0000-\\u001F\\u007F-\\u009F<>\"\\s{}|\\\\^`]+'"

# ============================================================
# Keyboard Bindings
# ============================================================

[keyboard]

# --- Disable all default bindings (matches WezTerm disable_default_key_bindings) ---
# Alacritty doesn't have a "disable all" option, so we override key defaults

# --- Clipboard ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "C"
mods = "Control|Shift"
action = "Copy"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "V"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "~Vi"
action = "Paste"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "V"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "Vi|Search"
action = "Paste"

# --- Font size (matches WezTerm Ctrl+=/-/0) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Plus"
mods = "Control"
action = "IncreaseFontSize"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Equals"
mods = "Control"
action = "IncreaseFontSize"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Minus"
mods = "Control"
action = "DecreaseFontSize"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Key0"
mods = "Control"
action = "ResetFontSize"

# --- Fullscreen (matches WezTerm F11) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "F11"
action = "ToggleFullscreen"

# --- Search (matches WezTerm Ctrl+Shift+F) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "F"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "~Search"
action = "SearchForward"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "B"
mods = "Control|Shift"
mode = "~Search"
action = "SearchBackward"

# --- Scrollback (matches WezTerm Ctrl+Shift+U/D, Shift+PageUp/Down) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "U"
mods = "Control|Shift"
action = "ScrollHalfPageUp"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "D"
mods = "Control|Shift"
action = "ScrollHalfPageDown"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "PageUp"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollPageUp"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "PageDown"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollPageDown"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Home"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollToTop"

[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "End"
mods = "Shift"
action = "ScrollToBottom"

# --- Clear scrollback (matches WezTerm Ctrl+Shift+L) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "L"
mods = "Control"
action = "ClearLogNotice"

# --- Vi Mode toggle (replaces WezTerm copy mode with Leader [) ---
[[keyboard.bindings]]
key = "Space"
mods = "Shift|Control"
mode = "~Search"
action = "ToggleViMode"

# ============================================================
# Vi Mode Keybindings
# (Replaces WezTerm's copy_mode and search_mode key_tables)
# ============================================================

# Alacritty's built-in Vi mode provides these bindings automatically:
#   h/j/k/l → move cursor
#   w/b/e → word motions
#   0/$ → line start/end
#   g/G → top/bottom of scrollback
#   v/V/Ctrl+V → char/line/block selection
#   y → copy selection
#   / → search forward, ? → search backward
#   n/N → next/prev match
#   Ctrl+U/D → half page up/down
#   Ctrl+B/F → page up/down
#   i/I/Ctrl+C → exit vi mode
#   Escape → clear selection or exit vi mode
#
# Use Ctrl+Shift+Space to toggle Vi mode (replaces WezTerm Leader [ / Leader y)
